news.headline: Jack Graham — OUT: Shoulder (5-6 weeks)
news.body: Jack Graham (West Coast) has been ruled OUT with a shoulder; estimated return 5-6 weeks. Expect a price dip - trade or bench until they return. Status updated: Concussion → Shoulder; ETA Gold Coast → 5-6 weeks.
news.change_desc: Concussion → Shoulder; ETA Gold Coast → 5-6 weeks

news.headline: Ryan Angwin — OUT: Hand (3 weeks)
news.body: Ryan Angwin (GWS Giants) has been ruled OUT with a hand; estimated return 3 weeks. Expect a price dip - trade or bench until they return.
